pose: high plank position (top of a push-up) facing the camera, arms fully extended and shoulders stacked over the wrists, body in a straight line from shoulders to heels while both hands press onto the Pilates block placed directly in front of the chest
gaze: model looking directly into the camera with a calm, confident expression
outfit: minimal elegant beige activewear, fitted sports top and high-waist leggings
feet_style: barefoot on a pilates mat with feet extended behind and toes grounded
composition_goal: Pilates block positioned very close to the camera in the foreground so the block and logo are clearly visible and occupy a significant portion of the frame
mood: strong, controlled pilates movement with an elegant premium studio aesthetic
framing: frontal camera angle aligned with the model's body, slightly low perspective so the block appears prominently in the foreground while the full body remains visible
